benefits.description: Restored drive to find a partner, not just physical urge; increased libido reduced by Adderall, stress, sleeplessness, and age
Felt more friendly and flirtatious; more motivated and driven
Lowered performance anxiety; improved social engagement

protocol_notes: ADHD (not autistic), socially 'slow' due to ADHD and being an only child. Uses PT-141 situationally around friends or before dates. Reports no inappropriate behavior observed by others. Also takes Adderall.
